title: Golden Globes 2026: Key Takeaways and Jay Kelly's Mixed Results
text: The Ankler provides analysis of Golden Globes 2026 key takeaways and surprises. Wicked: For Good faced unexpected challenges at the Golden Globes. While the sequel secured nominations for leads Cynthia Erivo and Ariana Grande plus two original song nominations, it conspicuously missed the best musical or comedy picture category, a significant disappointment given the voters' historical appetite for spectacle. The article notes that the sequel's best picture nomination might be melting away due to softer box office performance and increased competition compared to the first film's awards run. Netflix delivered mixed results. Jay Kelly earned nominations for George Clooney and Adam Sandler but missed the best musical or comedy picture race entirely, raising questions about its Oscar viability. The streaming giant's overall morning remained surprisingly quiet during a period when it's reportedly pursuing Warner Bros. acquisition. Neon led all studios with 21 nominations, commanding the international feature category with five of six nominees. The company could become the first distributor since 2017 to place three international features in the best picture race. Composer Nicholas Britell discussed creating music that functions as its own character, describing collaboration with director Noah Baumbach as exploring a romantic sound celebrating cinema itself.
